protocol.name: ID-JAG Delegation Flow (Human-to-Agent)
protocol.description: Identity Assertion JWT Authorization Grant with human delegation per draft-ietf-oauth-identity-assertion-authz-grant. Uses OAuth token exchange to obtain ID-JAG from IdP, then JWT bearer assertion to exchange for access token at Resource AS.

entities.name: Human User
entities.description: The principal whose identity is delegated to the agent

entities.name: IdP Authorization Server
entities.description: Issues ID-JAG assertions via OAuth token exchange (grant_type=token-exchange, requested_token_type=id-jag)

entities.name: AI Agent
entities.description: Agent acting on behalf of the human user

entities.name: Resource Authorization Server
entities.description: Exchanges ID-JAG for access tokens via JWT bearer grant (grant_type=jwt-bearer)

entities.name: JWKS Endpoint
entities.description: Distributes public keys for signature verification

entities.name: Resource Server
entities.description: Authorizes based on both user identity and actor

phases.name: User Authentication
phases.description: Human user authenticates with IdP and authorizes agent

phases.name: ID-JAG Issuance
phases.description: Agent requests ID-JAG from IdP via OAuth token exchange

phases.name: Access Token Exchange
phases.description: Agent exchanges ID-JAG for access token at Resource AS via JWT bearer

phases.name: Delegated Resource Access
phases.description: Agent accesses resources on behalf of user

flows.label: Authenticate (OAuth/OIDC/SAML)
flows.description: User authenticates and receives ID token or refresh token

flows.label: ID Token / Refresh Token
flows.description: User receives identity token for later delegation

flows.label: Delegate Task + Provide ID Token
flows.description: User provides agent with task and identity token for delegation

flows.label: POST /token (grant_type=token-exchange, requested_token_type=id-jag, subject_token=ID_TOKEN)
flows.description: Agent requests ID-JAG using OAuth token exchange per IETF draft

flows.label: Validate subject_token (ID Token/Refresh Token)
flows.description: IdP validates the user's identity from subject_token

flows.label: Check Delegation Policy
flows.description: Verify agent is authorized to act for this user

flows.label: Create ID-JAG JWT (typ=oauth-id-jag+jwt, iss, sub, aud, client_id, jti, exp, iat)
flows.description: Build ID-JAG with required claims per IETF draft; optionally include act claim per RFC 8693

flows.label: 200 OK (access_token=ID-JAG, issued_token_type=id-jag, token_type=N_A)
flows.description: Return ID-JAG in token exchange response format

flows.label: POST /token (grant_type=jwt-bearer, assertion=ID-JAG)
flows.description: Exchange ID-JAG for access token using JWT bearer grant per RFC 7523

flows.label: GET /.well-known/jwks.json
flows.description: Fetch IdP's public keys for ID-JAG verification

flows.label: Verify ID-JAG: signature, typ=oauth-id-jag+jwt, claims
flows.description: Verify signature, check typ header, validate required claims (iss, sub, aud, client_id, jti, exp, iat)

flows.label: Apply Authorization Policies
flows.description: Check if user+agent combination is allowed requested scope

flows.label: Issue Access Token (preserves sub, optionally act)
flows.description: Access token contains user identity; may include actor if present in ID-JAG

flows.label: GET /api/resource (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>)
flows.description: Agent calls API on behalf of user

flows.label: Validate Access Token + Extract sub (user)
flows.description: Resource server validates token and extracts user identity

flows.label: Task Completed (Result Summary)
flows.description: Agent returns the result of the delegated action to the user
